widgets.title: Announcement Bar
widgets.description: Dismissible-looking colored bar with icon, title, subtitle, and CTA button. Used for time-sensitive announcements at the top of the page.

properties.name: subtitle_text
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: Step-by-step guidance to restore your Gainsight integrations.

defaultConfig.subtitle_text: Step-by-step guidance to restore your Gainsight integrations.

widgets.title: Feedback CTA
widgets.description: Full-width dark CTA banner with title, subtitle, button, and decorative circles in the background. Intended for 'Questions or Feedback?'

properties.name: subtitle_text
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: We'd love to hear from you.

defaultConfig.subtitle_text: We'd love to hear from you.

widgets.title: Hero
widgets.description: Full-width hero section with gradient background, large gradient title, and a supporting paragraph. Used as the main page header.

properties.name: subtitle_text
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: Welcome to Gainsight University. You'll find content to support all of the Gainsight products. Explore free online training, register for premium virtual instructor-led courses, or earn professional certifications.

defaultConfig.subtitle_text: Welcome to Gainsight University. You'll find content to support all of the Gainsight products. Explore free online training, register for premium virtual instructor-led courses, or earn professional certifications.

widgets.title: Info Bar
widgets.description: Slim horizontal info bar with icon, message, and pill button. Used for persistent status or informational messages.

properties.name: message_text
properties.label: Message
properties.defaultValue: Gainsight University welcomes Skilljar users! Same content, new home.

defaultConfig.message_text: Gainsight University welcomes Skilljar users! Same content, new home.

widgets.title: Persona Grid
widgets.description: Section header + 3-column grid of persona tiles (up to 15). Each tile has an icon, title, and link. Intended for 'Find Training for Your Role'. Leave a tile's title blank to hide it.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: Jump straight to the content specifically built for your role.

properties.name: tile3_title
properties.label: Tile 3 - Title
properties.defaultValue: CS Adoption Champion or Team Manager

defaultConfig.section_subtitle: Jump straight to the content specifically built for your role.
defaultConfig.tile3_title: CS Adoption Champion or Team Manager

widgets.title: Product Catalog Grid
widgets.description: Section header + 3-column grid of product cards (up to 6). Each card has an icon, title, description, and link. Intended for 'Explore Courses by Product'.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: Dive into self-paced training organized by the Gainsight product you use every day.

properties.name: card1_desc
properties.label: Card 1 - Description
properties.defaultValue: From onboarding to advanced administration, these courses cover everything you need to succeed with Gainsight CS.

properties.name: card2_desc
properties.label: Card 2 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Explore courses designed to help you launch, manage, and grow a thriving community.

properties.name: card3_desc
properties.label: Card 3 - Description
properties.defaultValue: From first setup to advanced analytics, these courses help you get the most out of the platform.

properties.name: card4_desc
properties.label: Card 4 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Whether you're setting up your first course or optimizing an established program, you'll find the resources you need here.

properties.name: card5_desc
properties.label: Card 5 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Get up to speed quickly with courses built around the core features and workflows in Staircase AI.

properties.name: card6_desc
properties.label: Card 6 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Learn how to build, launch, and manage a best-in-class customer education program with Gainsight CE.

defaultConfig.section_subtitle: Dive into self-paced training organized by the Gainsight product you use every day.
defaultConfig.card1_desc: From onboarding to advanced administration, these courses cover everything you need to succeed with Gainsight CS.
defaultConfig.card2_desc: Explore courses designed to help you launch, manage, and grow a thriving community.
defaultConfig.card3_desc: From first setup to advanced analytics, these courses help you get the most out of the platform.
defaultConfig.card4_desc: Whether you're setting up your first course or optimizing an established program, you'll find the resources you need here.
defaultConfig.card5_desc: Get up to speed quickly with courses built around the core features and workflows in Staircase AI.
defaultConfig.card6_desc: Learn how to build, launch, and manage a best-in-class customer education program with Gainsight CE.

widgets.title: Quick Links
widgets.description: Section with two large bordered cards, each with icon, title, description, and link. Intended for 'More Ways to Learn'.

properties.name: card1_desc
properties.label: Card 1 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Customers can register for live interactive training and go deeper into technical topics.

properties.name: card2_desc
properties.label: Card 2 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Complete levels of certification for Admins and CSMs to enhance your career.

defaultConfig.card1_desc: Customers can register for live interactive training and go deeper into technical topics.
defaultConfig.card2_desc: Complete levels of certification for Admins and CSMs to enhance your career.

widgets.title: Training Directory
widgets.description: Narrow top bar that expands to a full mega-menu of training categories and links. Modeled after the Gainsight University site navigation.

properties.name: label_px_cspx
properties.label: PX - CS & PX Better Together Label

properties.name: url_px_cspx
properties.label: PX - CS & PX Better Together URL

widgets.title: What's New Carousel
widgets.description: Section header + horizontal scrolling carousel of course cards with arrow navigation. Up to 8 cards. Leave a card's title blank to hide it.

properties.name: section_subtitle
properties.label: Section Subtitle
properties.defaultValue: The latest courses and learning paths added to Gainsight University.

properties.name: card1_desc
properties.label: Card 1 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Get a tour of the essentials. Understand goals, key concepts, and how the learning path works so you can start with confidence.

properties.name: card2_desc
properties.label: Card 2 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Prepare your account and environment. Configure core settings, connect integrations, and follow best practices to avoid common pitfalls.

properties.name: card3_desc
properties.label: Card 3 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Build your first project step by step. Structure content, apply templates, and use time-saving tips to deliver a polished result.

properties.name: card4_desc
properties.label: Card 4 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Launch with impact. Learn channels, messaging, and timing to reach your audience and drive engagement from day one.

properties.name: card5_desc
properties.label: Card 5 - Description
properties.defaultValue: Track what matters. Read dashboards, interpret metrics, and turn insights into actions that improve outcomes.

defaultConfig.section_subtitle: The latest courses and learning paths added to Gainsight University.
defaultConfig.card1_desc: Get a tour of the essentials. Understand goals, key concepts, and how the learning path works so you can start with confidence.
defaultConfig.card2_desc: Prepare your account and environment. Configure core settings, connect integrations, and follow best practices to avoid common pitfalls.
defaultConfig.card3_desc: Build your first project step by step. Structure content, apply templates, and use time-saving tips to deliver a polished result.
defaultConfig.card4_desc: Launch with impact. Learn channels, messaging, and timing to reach your audience and drive engagement from day one.
defaultConfig.card5_desc: Track what matters. Read dashboards, interpret metrics, and turn insights into actions that improve outcomes.
